title: COLLATE operator inside CHECK constraint fails in shared-cache mode
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a VARCHAR(255), CHECK (a IN ('one', 'two', 'three')));
CREATE TABLE t2(b INT, c VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t2(b, c) VALUES(1, NULL);
INSERT INTO t1 SELECT 'two' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t2 WHERE b = 1);
key_bug_features: COLLATE operator in CHECK constraint with shared-cache mode
